Home.name: Dual Sensor Gas Leak Detector & Carbon Monoxide Detector
Home.desc: Quick Alert & Dual Alarm System: RV carbon monoxide detectors designed with both sound and flashing light alerts, this detector activates when gas levels reach dangerous thresholds (CO ≥ 150PPM or natural gas ≥ 5%LEL). It emits a loud ≥ 85 dB alarm and flashing red light, alerting you and your family instantly in the event of a leak.

Home.name: Magnetic Levitation Bluetooth Speaker
